'''Gertafuu VI''' was a [[Temperature/Legends|frigid]] astronomical object that occupied the sixth [[Orbit/Legends|orbital]] position<ref name="Bartyn's Landing" /> within the [[Gertafuu system/Legends|Gertafuu system]] of [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]].<ref name="TEA" /> It was the site of [[Fort Balarad]], a well-protected [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] outpost. At some point, Fort Balarad's [[Aqualish/Legends|Aqualish]] and [[Whiphid/Legends|Whiphid]] inhabitants [[Merchant/Legends|traded]] in [[Hair/Legends|furs]] and exotic meat.<ref name="Bartyn's Landing" />

==Behind the scenes==
Gertafuu VI was first mentioned in the [[Star Wars Gamer 7|seventh issue]] of the ''[[Star Wars Gamer]]'' magazine, which was published in [[2001]]. The celestial body was described within [[Cory J. Herndon]]'s article "[[Bartyn's Landing (article)|Bartyn's Landing]]," in a sidebar detailing alternate ways to adapt the [[Bartyn's Landing]] setting, presented in the article, for use with [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Bartyn's Landing" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Gertafuu [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore Gertafuu VI, in grid square S-18.<ref name="TEA" />
